item.title: We built an Arduino MIDI controller, but not your usual MIDI controller.
item.author: Unknown
item.description: This is how we got into an innovation grants project without any prior expectations nor experience and figured our way through by creating a MIDI controller. I'm going to talk about all the insights, issues and how we resolved them. Also featuring some really crucial tips and an Ableton rack.

item.title: The biggest mistake of my early career
item.author: Unknown
item.description: Mistakes are good. They imply you're in an uncomfortable place. I was so uncomfortable I left the place. But the place keeps chasing me till this day.

item.title: Hello world!
item.author: Unknown
item.description: Who am I? What is this? What is love? Baby don't hurt me
